title: FermionFieldLayout
description: Layout descriptor for a discrete fermionic field on Y_h, specifying the cell-to-spinor-block structure, total state-space size, and storage conventions.

layoutId.description: Unique identifier for this field layout

branchManifestId.description: Branch manifest ID governing this layout

spinorSpecId.description: SpinorRepresentationSpec ID defining spinor block size

gaugeDimPerCell.description: Gauge group dimension dimG per cell (e.g., 3 for su(2), 8 for su(3)). The total block size per cell is spinorDimPerCell * gaugeDimPerCell.

totalStateDimension.description: Total state-space dimension = cellCount * spinorDimPerCell * gaugeDimPerCell

storageOrder.description: Storage order convention: cell-major (outer index = cell) or spinor-major

innerProductConventionId.description: Fermionic inner product convention: must match spinor spec. For Riemannian Y: sum_c psi[c]^dagger phi[c] * vol(c).

massMatrixStorageRef.description: Artifact path for the serialized mass matrix M_psi (block-diagonal, vol(c)*I per cell). May be null if mass matrix is computed on demand.
